db_migration.evidence: Live psql \d users: password_hash nullable, auth_provider NOT NULL DEFAULT 'local', google_sub, uq_users_google_sub partial unique index, chk_users_credential CHECK all present. Migration idempotent (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + ALTER ... IF NOT EXISTS + DO/EXCEPTION guard).

cookies_session.evidence: Login Set-Cookie: access_token HttpOnly Path=/ Max-Age=900 SameSite=lax; refresh_token HttpOnly Path=/auth/refresh Max-Age=604800. /auth/me works with cookie only; Bearer header still works; logout 204 then /auth/me 401; refresh via cookie 200.

google_oauth_flow.evidence: 12 unit tests pass: login redirect+state cookie, 503 unconfigured, invalid_state, email_unverified, new-user create (role=client), link existing local, existing google_sub no-duplicate, inactive blocked. NOT live-verified end-to-end against real Google (needs user's GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET).
google_oauth_flow.note: G-checks verified via mocked unit tests; real Google round-trip pending user credentials.

security.evidence: OAuth role hardcoded client; state CSRF single-use compare_digest; redirect restricted to FRONTEND_URL; no secret logging; client_secret server-side only; inactive rejected; DocsAuthMiddleware cookie-or-header; email/password unchanged; OAuth-only acct cannot password-login (401).

config_deps.evidence: google-auth>=2.0.0 in requirements; env vars in .env.example + docker-compose; next.config.mjs rewrites /api/:path* -> backend:8000; login page + AuthContext use credentials:include.

tests_quality.evidence: test_auth_google.py (12 tests) green; cookie-or-header + cookie-docs + db functions covered; ruff + mypy clean; full suite 216 passed (2 pre-existing unrelated Alpaca MCP-config failures).

outstanding: Live Google round-trip requires real GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET + an authorized redirect URI in Google Cloud; verified via mocks only.
Next.js rewrites Set-Cookie pass-through on the OAuth callback redirect should be confirmed once the frontend is rebuilt and Google creds are set (plan risk #1).
